summary: Multi-Tenant Architecture Testing Complete - 18/18 backend tests passed, Frontend login and access control verified. Fixed bug in tenant store/warehouse creation (missing created_at and store_id fields). Data isolation between tenants VERIFIED.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning)

passed_tests: ✓ Backend: Super admin login (POST /api/auth/login) with admin/admin123
✓ Backend: Super admin invalid password returns 401
✓ Backend: GET /api/auth/me for super admin - no tenant_id in response
✓ Backend: Create tenant (POST /api/tenants) - returns id, admin_username, admin_password
✓ Backend: List tenants (GET /api/tenants) - super admin only
✓ Backend: Tenant user blocked from /api/tenants (403 Forbidden)
✓ Backend: Tenant login (POST /api/auth/tenant-login) works with tenant_id/username/password
✓ Backend: Invalid tenant_id returns 404
✓ Backend: Invalid tenant credentials returns 401
✓ Backend: GET /api/auth/me for tenant user returns tenant_id
✓ Backend: CRITICAL DATA ISOLATION - Products created in Tenant 1 NOT visible in Tenant 2
✓ Backend: Store isolation between tenants verified
✓ Backend: Category isolation between tenants verified
✓ Backend: Customer isolation between tenants verified
✓ Backend: Toggle tenant status (active/inactive) works
✓ Backend: Inactive tenant cannot login (403 Forbidden)
✓ Backend: Tenant-scoped Product CRUD works (Create/Read/Update/Delete)
✓ Backend: Tenant-scoped Warehouse listing works
✓ Frontend: Login page shows both tabs (管理员登录 and 商家登录)
✓ Frontend: Admin login with pre-filled credentials works
✓ Frontend: Super Admin badge displayed for super admin users
✓ Frontend: SaaS商家管理 link visible for super admin in sidebar
✓ Frontend: TenantsPage loads with tenant list, stats cards, create form
✓ Frontend: Tenant login form has tenant_id, username, password fields
✓ Frontend: Tenant login successful - shows tenant name in toast and sidebar
✓ Frontend: SECURITY - Tenant users do NOT see SaaS商家管理 link
✓ Frontend: Tenant users do NOT see Super Admin badge

features_verified.tenant_creation: PASS - POST /api/tenants creates isolated DB with default store, warehouse, admin user
features_verified.data_isolation: PASS - Products, stores, categories, customers all tenant-isolated
features_verified.tenant_status_control: PASS - Toggle active/inactive, inactive tenants blocked from login
features_verified.frontend_login_tabs: PASS - Admin tab and Tenant tab both functional
features_verified.frontend_access_control: PASS - SaaS menu only visible for super admin
features_verified.api_auth_me: PASS - Returns tenant_id for tenant users, no tenant_id for super admin

bugs_fixed.issue: Default store and warehouse created for new tenants were missing required fields
bugs_fixed.fix: Added created_at to store and store_id + created_at to warehouse in create_tenant function

critical_code_review_comments: Tenant creation was missing created_at for store and store_id/created_at for warehouse - FIXED

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All login flows and access control verified

seed_data_creation: Created test tenant 'UI_Test_Tenant' for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant architecture fully tested. Key points: (1) Super admin at /api/auth/login with no tenant_id in token, (2) Tenants at /api/auth/tenant-login with tenant_id in token, (3) All routes use get_user_db(current_user) to return correct DB, (4) Frontend conditionally shows SaaS menu via isSuperAdmin = user?.role === 'admin' && !user?.tenant_id. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_multitenant.py can be reused.

multi_tenant_architecture.database_model: Database-per-tenant: master DB for admin/tenants, tenant_{id} DB for each tenant
multi_tenant_architecture.db_routing: get_user_db(current_user) returns tenant DB if tenant_id exists, else master DB
multi_tenant_architecture.access_control: Tenant management endpoints check: role=admin AND no tenant_id
